SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-14-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-14-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE: JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF DANIEL ALAPATI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MENDOZA & CORTES LLC IS PRESENT. APPEARING ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF ARE VIANNEY HERNANDEZ & RANDY MENDOZA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-14-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ALAPATI, DANIEL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MENDOZA & CORTES LLC DBA RANDY AND SON'S AUTO REPAIR SHOP $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,290.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RECEIVED RETURNED MAIL FROM THE POST OFFICE. SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER, MAILED TO JAMES COLLIE. RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD,
